sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A lu tung vang liatna khu a,
itna luang, A muk pan itna luang,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Leitung mi tehpih ding omlo, Amah apha bel
Vantung mi lak ah zong omlo, Amah kilawm bel hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: sung ka kiat hong mu-a, hon ding hong delhpah hi;
Kei a’ding singlamteh pua-a, kei dahna kisuan

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ama hangin kei ka nungta, Nuamna zong A hong pia;
gualzo sak sihna tungah, han sung pan hong honkhia,

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: omna vantung khua-ah Kei hong tunpih ding hi;
Pasian phatna hong lak dinga, ka nuamna kim ding

sections.label: Verse 6
lines: Pasian citna le hong itna, hi bang ka theih
Lungsim tul nei leng zong, Topa kong pia khin ding hi Nang,
Kong pia khin ding hi Nang.
